comments.post_body:
What if we could decentralize the gig economy and find the perfect person for any task?

I'm thrilled to announce that my team and I won the OpenHack hackathon!

We developed a decentralized platform where users can post tasks. Using blockchain technology and a GraphRAG model, our system intelligently matches the best-suited individuals for each job. In return for their work, users earn "Help Coins," which can then be exchanged for rewards.

I'm incredibly proud of what we built in such a short amount of time.

A huge thank you to the entire OpenHack team for organizing such a fantastic and challenging event.

I also want to extend my gratitude to all the amazing sponsors and mentors for their invaluable support and guidance: Microsoft 
Google Framer Dribble NordVPN Raycast ROSHEN Confectionery Corporation 

And of course, a massive shoutout to my amazing teammates Paul Burca, Peter Ana and Cristian Dinca I couldn't have done it without you.


The mess that the repo is can be found here: https://lnkd.in/dEGHUMy7

#Hackathon #Blockchain #GraphRAG #Web3 #Rewards #OpenHackRO #Tech #Microsoft #Google #Framer #Dribbble #NordVPN #Go #Golang
comments.context_summary: The commenter is announcing their team's win at the OpenHack hackathon, where they developed a decentralized platform using blockchain technology to match users with tasks, and is expressing gratitude to the organizers, sponsors, and teammates. The platform allows users to earn rewards in the form of 'Help Coins' for completing tasks.

comments.comment_body:
Alexandru-Răzvan Olariu Thank you sir,   I appreciate you reaching out. It was a pleasure meeting and working with you at the hackathon.

comments.post_body:
Only 2 more days until the start of Deeptech GigaHack 2025
aaaand we can't wait to share this innovation playground with you!

We backed 8 challenges together with our extremely great partners:
EnergyTech (smart meter whisperer) by UNDP Moldova
AI-Powered Parking Assistant by Orbility
Cybersecurity Module for EVO App by e-Governance Academy and e-Governance Agency Moldova
AI Clinical Assessment Engine by Beden Grup Healthcare Systems LTD. x Invitro Diagnostics
CyberCare for Businesses by Orange 
AgriFood (farmData Rewards) by EIT Food
FinTech (privacy guard) by Fineguide x National Bank of Moldova
and a challange for those that want to touch event more by EU4Innovation East, Ukraine-Moldova American Enterprise Fund, and Innovate Moldova

If you recognize yourself with our vision, you are a developer, a visionary, or a problem-solver, this is your very last call: https://gigahack.md/

Join us and let's build the future together, from Friday, September 12, to Sunday, September 14, at Tekwill.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about the upcoming Deeptech GigaHack 2025 event, which will feature 8 innovation challenges in various fields such as EnergyTech, AI, and FinTech. The event is calling for developers, visionaries, and problem-solvers to join and build the future together.

comments.comment_body: Mult succes, Mihaela-Ștefania Truică !
comments.post_body:
Mihaela-Ștefania Truică cauta oportunitati in Bucuresti sau remote🌇⬇️

🔍Orasul in care caut o oportunitate momentan este Bucuresti.
Domeniul financiar, avand in vedere licenta pe care o urmez - Finante, Asigurari, Banci si Burse de Valori.

Nu am experienta anterioara efectiva pe piata muncii, insa am participat la actiuni de voluntariat, in cadrul carora am luat parte la workshop-uri de trading si am desfasurat diferite activitati in cadrul proiectelor interne, in prezent particip activ din pozitia de Project Assistant la un proiect ce urmeaza sa aiba loc curand!

De asemenea mentionez ca sunt in cautare de oportunitati part-time/internship, preferabil remote.

#opentowork #opportunities
comments.context_summary: Mihaela-Ștefania Truică is looking for job opportunities in Bucharest or remote, specifically in the financial domain, and is open to part-time or internship positions, despite having no prior work experience but some volunteer and project experience. She is seeking a role that can be done remotely, highlighting her skills and availability.

comments.comment_body: Thank you for the awesome and high quality content! I will for sure watch more courses from you, sir!
comments.post_body:
I've successfully completed the learning path "Become a C++ Developer" from LinkedIn Learning, a learning path which consists of over 17 hours of C++ theory and in-depth exercises!

My favorite module of the learning path was and still is "Web Servers and APIs Using C++", by Troy Miles.

The module was outstanding, I've learnt how to create and automate Web Servers with C++, deploy resources using Docker, include HTML5, CSS3 and PHP elements and, last but not least, integrate external resources such as MongoDB to the Web Servers.

I'm very grateful for everything that I've learnt and this is just the start!

I recommend the learning path "Become a C++ Developer" for every C++ passionate programmer and for everyone else who would like to enrichen their C++ knowledge.

Link to the LinkedIn Learning Path: https://lnkd.in/eW3dXWz

Thank you, everyone!

#developer #docker #programming #cplusplus #objectorientedprogramming #linkedinlearning
comments.context_summary: The commenter has completed the 'Become a C++ Developer' learning path on LinkedIn Learning and is sharing their positive experience, highlighting their favorite module on web servers and APIs using C++. They highly recommend the learning path to fellow C++ enthusiasts and those looking to expand their C++ knowledge.
